brokenLinks.impact: The link "https://sanketzoreportfoli.vercel.app/" could not be reached (Timeout after 8 seconds). Users who click it will see a browser error message, destroying trust and potentially losing them as visitors. If this is an internal link, it may signal a downed server or misconfigured DNS.
brokenLinks.recommendation: Verify the URL is correct and the target server is online. Check for DNS resolution failures, firewall rules blocking the destination, or SSL certificate errors. If the resource is permanently gone, remove the link.

uiIssues.description: Button 1 has no visible text and no aria-label attribute.
uiIssues.impact: Keyboard-only and screen-reader users cannot determine what this button does. Automated accessibility audits will flag this as a WCAG 2.1 Level A failure (Success Criterion 4.1.2).
uiIssues.recommendation: Add meaningful text inside the button element, or add an aria-label attribute. If the button only contains an icon, pair it with a visually-hidden <span> or use aria-label.
uiIssues.selector: div#root > div:nth-of-type(2) > header > nav > div > button

uiIssues.description: Link 10 (href: "https://github.com/SanketZore") has no visible text and no aria-label.
uiIssues.impact: Screen readers read this link as "link" with no destination hint. Search engines treat anchor text as a relevance signal — an empty link passes no keyword value.
uiIssues.recommendation: Provide descriptive anchor text or an aria-label that describes the destination. Avoid generic text like "click here".
uiIssues.selector: div#root > div:nth-of-type(2) > div > section > div > div > div:nth-of-type(3) > a:nth-of-type(1)

uiIssues.description: Heading level jumps from H1 to H3. Heading text: "3+"
uiIssues.impact: Screen readers use heading structure to let users navigate the page by section. Skipping levels confuses this outline and breaks WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 1.3.1.
uiIssues.recommendation: Change the H3 to an H2 so the outline is sequential.
uiIssues.selector: div#root > div:nth-of-type(2) > div > section > div > div > div:nth-of-type(4) > div:nth-of-type(1) > h3

uiIssues.description: Two interactive elements overlap: a and a at 1280×800.
uiIssues.impact: When clickable elements overlap, users may accidentally trigger the wrong action. On touchscreens the problem is amplified.
uiIssues.recommendation: Use browser DevTools to identify the overlapping elements and fix their positioning (check z-index, absolute/fixed positioning, or negative margins).

uiIssues.description: This page has no <meta name="description"> tag (or the content is empty).
uiIssues.impact: Search engines often display the meta description as the snippet text in search results. Without it, Google generates its own excerpt, which may reduce click-through rate.
uiIssues.recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> inside <head> with a concise summary (ideally 150–160 characters).
